# chabad-org-zmanim

> Zero-dependency TypeScript client for the Chabad.org Zmanim (halachic times) API. Server-side only (Node.js 18+, Bun, Deno, Cloudflare Workers). Does NOT work in browsers due to CORS.

## Key facts

- Fetches halachic times (zmanim) from Chabad.org's internal API
- Returns parsed, structured data with full TypeScript types
- Supports single-day and date-range queries
- Locations are specified by US ZIP code (locationType: 2) or Chabad city ID (locationType: 1)
- All fetch functions accept an AbortSignal for cancellation
- Throws typed errors: ZmanimNetworkError, ZmanimParseError, ZmanimError

## Quick start

```ts
import { getZmanimByZip } from "chabad-org-zmanim";

const result = await getZmanimByZip(11213, new Date());
console.log(result.days[0].times.Shkiah); // "7:04 PM"
```

## Main functions

- `getZmanimByZip(zip: number, date: Date, signal?: AbortSignal)` — Fetch zmanim for a US ZIP code
- `getZmanimByCity(cityId: number, date: Date, signal?: AbortSignal)` — Fetch zmanim for a Chabad city ID
- `getZmanimRange(locationId, locationType, startDate, endDate, signal?)` — Fetch a date range
- `fetchZmanim(options: ZmanimOptions)` — Full-control fetch, returns parsed result
- `fetchZmanimRaw(options: ZmanimOptions)` — Returns raw API JSON response
- `getTime(day: ParsedDay, type: ZmanType)` — Get a single time string from a day
- `hasCandleLighting(day: ParsedDay)` — Check if candle lighting exists
- `hasShabbosEnds(day: ParsedDay)` — Check if Shabbos ends exists
- `getSpecialZmanim(day: ParsedDay)` — Get only holiday-related zmanim
- `parseResponse(raw: ZmanimApiResponse)` — Parse raw API response manually
- `parseAspNetDate(s: string)` — Parse "/Date(timestamp)/" strings
- `stripHtml(html: string)` — Strip HTML tags and decode entities

## ZmanimOptions

```ts
interface ZmanimOptions {
  locationId: number;      // ZIP code or Chabad city ID
  locationType: 1 | 2;    // 1 = city ID, 2 = ZIP code
  date: Date;              // The date to fetch
  endDate?: Date;          // Optional end date for ranges
  aid?: number;            // Chabad.org affiliate ID (default: 143790)
  userAgent?: string;      // Custom User-Agent
  signal?: AbortSignal;    // For cancellation
}
```

## ParsedDay structure

```ts
interface ParsedDay {
  date: Date;
  displayDate: string;
  dayOfWeek: number;       // 0 = Sunday
  parsha: string | null;
  holidayName: string | null;
  isHoliday: boolean;
  isDstActive: boolean;
  zmanim: ParsedZman[];
  times: Record<string, string>; // e.g. { Shkiah: "7:04 PM" }
}
```

## Known ZmanType values

AlosHashachar, EarliestTefillin, NetzHachamah, LatestShema, LatestTefillah, LastEatingChametzTime, BurnChametzTime, Chatzos, MinchahGedolah, MinchahKetanah, PlagHaminchah, CandleLighting, Shkiah, Tzeis, ShabbosEnds, ChatzosNight, ShaahZmanit

## Error handling

```ts
try {
  const result = await getZmanimByZip(11213, new Date());
} catch (err) {
  if (err instanceof ZmanimNetworkError) {
    // Network failure or non-2xx HTTP status
    console.error(err.statusCode);
  } else if (err instanceof ZmanimParseError) {
    // JSON parse failure or missing fields
  }
}
```

- [npm package](https://www.npmjs.com/package/chabad-org-zmanim): npm registry page
- [Chabad.org Zmanim page](https://www.chabad.org/calendar/zmanim.htm): The website this library fetches data from
